value.found_quote: **`/planning`**       | Configurations | —                          | Enable multi-turn plan generation mode for complex engineering tasks.
value.rationale: The page explicitly lists the `/planning` command in the Core slash commands table, describing it as enabling "multi-turn plan generation mode for complex engineering tasks," which directly matches the claim. The page presents this as a current, active CLI feature with no indication of preview, deprecation, or sunset status.
